name: Elixinol Wellness Limited
description: Elixinol Wellness Limited is an Australia-based company global leader in the hemp industry, innovating, marketing, and selling hemp-derived nutraceuticals, cosmetics, and food products. The company operates through established brands including Elixinol, which focuses on high-quality hemp-derived CBD dietary supplements and skincare products, and Hemp Foods Australia, a leading distributor of hemp food products. Elixinol Wellness is dedicated to providing natural, plant-based wellness solutions to consumers worldwide while promoting sustainable farming and production practices.
